t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports.

issues.problem: Bundle resolver declared 'NO UPSTREAM WIKI was resolvable' despite Dim_Country.md and Dim_State_and_Province.md existing in the repo. Writer manually corrected this — tooling bug, not a wiki quality issue.
Footer says 'Phases: 13/14' but does not enumerate which phase was skipped. Reader cannot determine whether a data-critical phase (P2/P3) was incomplete.
All-conversions-blocked state is documented in multiple sections but lacks a top-level admonition/banner for quick scanning by analysts.

19 of 21 columns are Tier 2 because upstream sources (EXW_Settings.Resources, EXW_Settings.Tags, EXW_Settings.SystemRestrictions, EXW_Wallet.CryptoTypes) have no wiki documentation. Correctly flagged in review-needed sidecar.
No Atlassian sources identified. The SP change history note (Inessa K, 2026-04-14) is included inline — acceptable given no formal Jira ticket was linked.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: No regeneration needed. Wiki passes at 9.50. Optional polish: (1) Enumerate skipped phase in footer. (2) Add top-level admonition for dormant/blocked conversion state. (3) Upgrade Tier 2 columns when EXW_Settings/CryptoTypes wikis become available.

table_level_stats_in_descriptions: FromSelectedValue distribution (33% true, 67% false) in element #14
skipped_phases: Phase 14 of 14 (inferred — exact phase unknown from footer)
